build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../.. && cargo build --release && cd apps/qypha-desktop && npm run build:web

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420

bundle.longDescription: Qypha is an enterprise-grade secure communication platform with 7-layer encryption, post-quantum cryptography, and zero-trace ghost mode.
